changeSet.author: shvets

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM dbo.chapter WHERE title IN ( 'Vertices and Edges', 'Simple Graphs', 'Paths and Walks', 'Directed Graph Basics', 'Weighted Edges', 'Modeling with Weighted Graphs', 'Depth-First Search', 'Breadth-First Search', 'Traversal Comparison', 'Dijkstra Algorithm', 'Bellman-Ford Algorithm', 'Floyd-Warshall Algorithm', 'Tree Fundamentals', 'Prim Algorithm', 'Kruskal Algorithm' );
